class.name: ShapeList
class.brief_description: List-like container for topology wrappers and selector helpers.
class.description: [ShapeList] stores topology wrappers and provides the first build123d-style selector operations implemented in this extension. It is intended for working with the results returned by [TopoShape] extraction methods.

method.name: append
method.description: Appends a non-null [TopoShape] to the list.

method.name: size
method.description: Returns the number of shapes in the list.

method.name: is_empty
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when the list contains no shapes.

method.name: get_item
method.description: Returns the shape at [param index].

method.name: to_array
method.description: Returns the list contents as a plain [Array].

method.name: first
method.description: Returns the first shape in the list.

method.name: last
method.description: Returns the last shape in the list.

method.name: center
method.description: Returns the average center of the shapes in the list, using each shape's bounding-box center.

method.name: get_bounding_box_min
method.description: Returns the minimum corner of the combined bounding box.

method.name: get_bounding_box_max
method.description: Returns the maximum corner of the combined bounding box.

method.name: get_bounding_box_size
method.description: Returns the size of the combined bounding box.

method.name: vertices
method.description: Returns all vertices contained by every shape in the list.

method.name: edges
method.description: Returns all edges contained by every shape in the list.

method.name: wires
method.description: Returns all wires contained by every shape in the list.

method.name: faces
method.description: Returns all faces contained by every shape in the list.

method.name: shells
method.description: Returns all shells contained by every shape in the list.

method.name: compounds
method.description: Returns all compounds contained by every shape in the list.

method.name: solids
method.description: Returns all solids contained by every shape in the list.

method.name: filter_by_position
method.description: Filters shapes by their center position along [param axis] and returns the matching shapes sorted by that position.

method.name: filter_by_axis
method.description: Alias for [method filter_by_position] that uses the build123d-style axis terminology.

method.name: filter_by_plane
method.description: Filters the list to shapes parallel to [param plane]. Faces are matched by normal, and edges and wires are matched by direction.

method.name: filter_by_length
method.description: Filters the list to shapes that expose length and fall within the given range.

method.name: filter_by_area
method.description: Filters the list to shapes that expose surface area and fall within the given range.

method.name: filter_by_volume
method.description: Filters the list to shapes that expose volume and fall within the given range.

method.name: filter_by_distance_to_point
method.description: Filters the list to shapes whose center lies within the given distance range from [param point].

method.name: filter_by_shape_type
method.description: Filters the list to shapes whose [method TopoShape.get_shape_type_name] matches [param shape_type_name].

method.name: filter_by_geom_type
method.description: Filters the list to edges and faces whose [method TopoShape.get_geom_type_name] matches [param geom_type_name].

method.name: filter_by
method.description: Filters the list using a [Callable] that returns [code]true[/code] for shapes to keep.

method.name: group_by_axis
method.description: Groups shapes by their center position along [param axis]. Each returned element is a [ShapeList] sorted by the grouping key.

method.name: group_by_length
method.description: Groups shapes by length. Each returned element is a [ShapeList] sorted by the grouping key.

method.name: group_by_area
method.description: Groups shapes by surface area. Each returned element is a [ShapeList] sorted by the grouping key.

method.name: group_by_volume
method.description: Groups shapes by volume. Each returned element is a [ShapeList] sorted by the grouping key.

method.name: group_by_shape_type
method.description: Groups shapes by OCCT shape type name.

method.name: group_by_geom_type
method.description: Groups edges and faces by OCCT geometric subtype name.

method.name: group_by
method.description: Groups shapes using a [Callable] that returns a numeric grouping key.

method.name: sort_by_axis
method.description: Sorts the list by the center position of each shape along [param axis].

method.name: sort_by_length
method.description: Sorts shapes that expose [method Edge.get_length] by length.

method.name: sort_by_area
method.description: Sorts shapes that expose [method TopoShape.get_surface_area] by area.

method.name: sort_by_volume
method.description: Sorts shapes that expose [method TopoShape.get_volume] by volume.

method.name: sort_by_shape_type
method.description: Sorts shapes by OCCT shape type name.

method.name: sort_by_geom_type
method.description: Sorts edges and faces by OCCT geometric subtype name.

method.name: sort_by
method.description: Sorts the list using a [Callable] that returns a numeric key.

method.name: sort_by_distance
method.description: Sorts the list by distance to [param other].

method.name: sort_by_distance_to_point
method.description: Sorts the list by distance to [param point].
